prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: ending illustration. Story world: Signal From Kharon-9. Premise: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies.. Setting: Mountain observatory and subterranean receiver array. Threat presence: The Quiet Orbit. Recurring motifs: black stars, phase drift, echoing pings. Ending card for "Compromised Truth" (PYRRHIC). Summary: You stop the broadcast but lose the array team in shutdown.. Deliver emotional closure with sequel-hook tension.. Subgenre: cosmic horror. Tone: INTENSE. Immediate scene brief: Signal From Kharon-9 - Compromised Truth Ending Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
